title: Y@buwciy #2983
definition:
Jebusite = "descendants of Jebus"

 1) descendants of the 3rd son of Canaan who lived in or around the
    site of Jebus, the early name for Jerusalem
nasbUsage:

    site of Jebus, the early name for Jerusalem
